title: Antigen Presentation
script_summary: A deep dive into antigen presentation and its crucial role in immune response.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about antigen presentation.
Antigen presentation is how our immune system identifies threats.
Cells capture antigens, then display them on their surfaces.
This interaction triggers T-cells, activating our immune response.
Without this process, our bodies would struggle to recognize infections!
Curious about how this impacts vaccines? Hit like and follow for more!
